languages.text: "Так и быть, забудь про Нунциуса. Можешь оставаться на судне сколько угодно и продолжать исследования".
"So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."
languages.original_text: "Так и быть, забудь про Нунциуса. Можешь оставаться на судне сколько угодно и продолжать исследования".

traits.locale_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."
"So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."
"So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

languages.text: «Que así sea. Olvide a Nuncius. Puede quedarse en la nave y continuar su investigación».
languages.original_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

traits.locale_text: «Que así sea. Olvide a Nuncius. Puede quedarse en la nave y continuar su investigación».

languages.text: “那就这样吧，忘掉努恩修斯。只要你愿意，你可以一直留在船上，继续你的研究。”
languages.original_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

traits.locale_text: “那就这样吧，忘掉努恩修斯。只要你愿意，你可以一直留在船上，继续你的研究。”

languages.text: « Très bien, oublions Nuncius. Vous pourrez rester à bord de ce vaisseau aussi longtemps que vous le souhaiterez et y poursuivre vos recherches. »
languages.original_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

traits.locale_text: « Très bien, oublions Nuncius. Vous pourrez rester à bord de ce vaisseau aussi longtemps que vous le souhaiterez et y poursuivre vos recherches. »

languages.text: "Öyle olsun, Nuncius'u unut. İstediğin kadar gemide kalıp araştırmalarına devam edebilirsin."
languages.original_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle olsun, Nuncius'u unut. İstediğin kadar gemide kalıp araştırmalarına devam edebilirsin."

languages.text: "Also schön. Vergesst Nuncius. Ihr dürft auf dem Schiff bleiben, solange Ihr Eure Forschung fortsetzen wollt."
languages.original_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

traits.locale_text: "Also schön. Vergesst Nuncius. Ihr dürft auf dem Schiff bleiben, solange Ihr Eure Forschung fortsetzen wollt."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスのことは忘れろ。望む限り船に残り、研究を続けるがいい」
languages.original_text: "So be it, forget about Nuncius. You may remain on the ship as long as you wish and continue your research."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスのことは忘れろ。望む限り船に残り、研究を続けるがいい」
